title: E14 2AA, Telehouse International Corporation of Europe Limited: environmental permit  issued – EPR/EP3507SL/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Telehouse International Corporation of Europe Limited Installation name: Docklands Technical Centre Permit number: EPR/EP3507SL/V002  "
